// Music Industry Portfolio

OskarPatalas

Bristol-based promoter, sound engineer & music industry practitioner. Over the past few years I've built Haystack Promotions from scratch, run sound across the city's independent venue circuit, stage managed festival stages & designed everything in between. The through-line across all of it is pretty simple: support artists who deserve a platform, build something that actually means something, & don't make it look like everyone else's.

haystackpromo@gmail.com @haystackpromo Bristol, UK

01

Festival Work

Focus Wales
Stage Management — 3 Years
OuterTown
Content Creation / Live Recording
2000 Trees
Artist Liaison / Stage Management

Three years of paid festival work spanning stage management, artist liaison, live band recording & content creation across the UK festival circuit. Built strong working relationships with booking agents, artists & production crews — using each festival as an active networking platform to bring talent back to Bristol.

02

Sound Engineering

BIMM — Live Sound Module
Formal Training
Completed accredited live sound module at BIMM, covering front-of-house mixing, monitor engineering, signal chain, and live venue acoustics.
The Old England
Bristol Venue — Regular Engineer
Regular sound engineer across a varied programme of live shows, developing strong technical consistency and adaptability across different genres and set-ups.
Gallimaufry
Bristol Venue — Freelance Engineer
Provided sound engineering support for live events at this well-regarded Bristol venue.
The Cock & Tail
Bristol Venue — Freelance Engineer
Primary sound engineer for Haystack Alt Night and other events — often doubling as show organiser and promoter on the same night.
03

Promotion

Haystack Promotions
Founder — 3+ Years
Founded and ran an independent alternative promotions company in Bristol, building working relationships with the majority of Bristol's active venues and developing a strong local reputation.
Steve Conte (New York Dolls)
Headline Show — Bristol
Organised and promoted a headline Bristol show for Steve Conte of the New York Dolls — demonstrating the ability to book and manage internationally recognised touring artists.
Curbside Skatepark Shows
Summer 2025 — 5 DIY Events
Conceptualised and delivered a series of 5 DIY punk all-dayers at Curbside Skatepark, BS3. Featured as Headfirst Bristol Editor's Pick. Raw, community-driven events capturing the spirit of Bristol's underground scene.
Haystack Alt Night
Bi-Weekly Residency — The Cock & Tail
Created and ran a successful bi-weekly event platforming new and debut bands in the Bristol scene. All booking, promotion, sound engineering and design handled in-house.
04

Haystack Brand

Haystack Promotions Company

Built the Haystack brand from scratch — designing all visual assets including logos, event posters, business cards and promotional materials. Developed a distinctive visual identity for the alternative Bristol scene that became recognisable across venues and online. Every poster, every asset, every show was self-directed from concept to execution.
